summary: The user sought recommendations for herbal teas after enjoying a peach tea, ultimately deciding to try Berry Bliss tea, which is caffeine-free. They also requested a cookie recipe to pair with the tea and expressed interest in the mindfulness podcast "The Mindful Kind," considering starting a mindfulness journal to enhance their tea breaks.
facts: The user recently tried a peach tea and loved it. The user decided to try Berry Bliss tea, which is caffeine-free. The user is interested in a cookie recipe that pairs well with berry-flavored tea. The user chose to make shortbread cookies with dried cranberries and orange zest to accompany their tea. The user is excited to try "The Mindful Kind" podcast to make their tea breaks more relaxing. The user is considering starting a mindfulness journal to complement their podcast listening.
